holdings.infoBox: AMGR is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.87%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.92%, Alphabet at 6.88%, ASML Holding at 6.34%, and NVIDIA at 6.29%.

overview.description: The Amana Growth ETF (AMGR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in stocks globally that are consistent with Islamic principles, according to the adviser. The ETF seeks to provide a diversified portfolio, positioned for long-term capital growth AMGR was launched on Jun 24, 2026 and is issued by Amana.
